---
title: "About"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---



<br/>

I am a computational biologist using genetic data to study diseases of the brain and the retina. 

<!-- I am passionate about reproducible research, and democratization of data. -->
<br/>
<br/>
<br/>

<!-- ## Teaching -->
<!-- <br/> -->

<!-- I also teach workshops in R for data analysis, automation and visualization. -->

<!-- <!-- https://education.rstudio.com/trainers/people/brendan+ansell/  --> -->
<!-- <br/> -->

<!-- ## Publications -->
<!-- <br/> -->

<!-- I wrote this [book](https://bookdown.org/ansellbr/WEHI_tidyR_course_book/) to help introduce people to R.   -->

<!-- <br/> -->

<!-- You can find a list of my scientific publications [here](https://scholar.google.com.au/citations?user=XMmsMV4AAAAJ&hl=en). -->

<!-- <br/> -->
<!-- <br/> -->

<!-- ## Projects -->

<!-- <br/> -->
<!-- <br/> -->
